title: Why Am I Here?: kaa na nia unapovinjari
description: Kiendelezi cha Chrome bure. Weka lengo la kuvinjari, fuatilia ulinganifu wa vichupo na muda unaotumika, na upate vikumbusho vyepesi vya usumbufu na shimo la sungura. Faragha na ndani.
ogImageAlt: Why Am I Here? — ikoni ya kiendelezi yenye alama ya kuuliza ya teal

privacy.title: Sera ya faragha ya Why Am I Here?
privacy.description: Jinsi Why Am I Here? inavyoshughulikia data yako. Ndani tu, hakuna akaunti, hakuna wingu. Majina na URL za vichupo tu lengo likiwa hai.
